name: Fillet of Beef with Cornichon Tarragon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 550°F.
2. Rub the beef fillet with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Place the fillet in a large roasting pan and roast for 23 minutes or until a meat thermometer registers 130°F for medium rare.
4. Transfer the fillet to a platter and loosely cover with foil, letting it stand for 15 minutes.
5. In a bowl, whisk together butter and mustard.
6. In a saucepan, combine shallots, wine, and tarragon; reduce mixture over medium heat until wine is reduced to about one cup.
7. Add cream and cornichons; reduce heat to low and whisk in the mustard-butter mixture, a little at a time, with any accumulated meat juices on the platter.
8. Season sauce with salt and pepper. Keep warm but do not boil.
9. Slice fillets and serve with sauce.
